name: 仙人之盾
description: 仙人模式期间免疫下一次伤害
skillCode: var piece = context.rulePiece; if (!piece || piece.currentHp <= 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (!context.piece || context.piece.instanceId !== piece.instanceId) return { success: false, message: '' }; var shieldTag = piece.statusTags && piece.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'sage-mode-shield'; }); if (!shieldTag) { removeRuleById(piece.instanceId, 'rule-naruto-sage-immunity'); return { success: false, message: '' }; } removeStatusEffectById(piece.instanceId, shieldTag.id); removeRuleById(piece.instanceId, 'rule-naruto-sage-immunity'); return { success: true, blocked: true, message: piece.name + '仙人之盾抵挡了一次伤害！' };
